steps.title: Introduce the elaboration
steps.content: The main clause says divergent strategies for preserving milk emerged. The words after the blank explain those strategies by contrasting rennet-coagulated cheesemaking with acid-heat coagulation methods.

steps.title: Use an explanatory mark
steps.content: Choice A adds an awkward and, Choice B gives no boundary, and Choice C uses a comma where a stronger explanatory mark is needed. A colon after a complete clause introduces the elaboration. The answer is D.
